# kong-gateway_rbac_user_group (Resource)

RbacUserGroup Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kong-gateway_rbac_user_group" "my_rbacusergroup" {
  group_id  = "...my_group_id..."
  user_id   = "...my_user_id..."
  workspace = "team-payments"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `group_id` (String) Requires replacement if changed.
- `user_id` (String) Requires replacement if changed.
- `workspace` (String) The name of the workspace. Default: "default"; Requires replacement if changed.
